hero.headline: CREATE CONTENT THAT SHAPES THE FUTURE

about.heading: About this Minor
about.body: Step into a professional Virtual Production studio and create content that doesn't exist yet. You will work alongside filmmakers, technologists, and storytellers to develop the skills that the industry needs next.

items.title: Unreal Engine
items.description: Real-time rendering, camera tracking and immersive worlds

items.title: Collaboration
items.description: Work alongside filmmakers, IT professionals, actors and camera operators

items.title: Booming Industry
items.description: Step into a fast-growing industry and prepare for the future of filmmaking

phases.title: Courses
phases.description: Master the fundamentals through hands-on workshops in Unreal Engine, LED volumes and camera tracking.

phases.title: Challenges
phases.description: Team-based projects where you collaborate across disciplines and experiment with immersive technologies.

phases.title: Project
phases.description: Work with companies, research teams or creative organizations on a real project in the area of VP that excites you most.

apply.heading: This Minor is for you if
checklist: Basic knowledge of 3D software or video editing
Affinity with technology and digital production
A good foundation of the English language
